findings.title: Path traversal via unvalidated user path
findings.description: ReadUserFile joins userPath onto baseDir with filepath.Join and reads it without cleaning or containment checks, so an input like ../../etc/passwd escapes baseDir and discloses arbitrary files.
findings.suggestion: Clean the joined path with filepath.Clean and confirm it remains within baseDir (e.g. strings.HasPrefix on the absolute paths or filepath.Rel without a leading ..) before calling os.ReadFile.
